title: Severe Heatwave Warning - North Bihar
description: IMD issues red alert for 8 districts. Temperature expected 46-48°C for next 3 days. Districts: Bhagalpur, Banka, Munger, Begusarai, Khagaria, Samastipur, Darbhanga, Madhubani.
action_required: Activate heat action plan, ensure water tanker deployment, open night shelters

title: Flood Alert - Kosi River Basin
description: Water level at Baltara gauge crossing warning mark. Nepal upstream discharge increasing. Affected districts: Supaul, Saharsa, Madhepura.
action_required: Pre-position NDRF teams, issue evacuation advisory for low-lying areas, activate flood shelters

title: SLA Breach - MGNREGA Wage Payments
description: Wage payments pending beyond 15 days for 3.2 lakh workers across 12 districts. FTO generation delayed at block level. Total pending: Rs 320 crore.
action_required: Direct District Programme Coordinators to clear FTOs within 48 hours

title: AES/JE Cases Rising - Muzaffarpur Division
description: 42 suspected AES cases reported in last 7 days across Muzaffarpur, Vaishali, and East Champaran. 3 deaths confirmed. Litchi season correlation suspected.
action_required: Deploy rapid response teams, ensure ICU bed availability, activate awareness campaign

title: NH-31 Bridge Damage - Katihar
description: Structural damage reported on NH-31 bridge near Katihar due to heavy vehicle overloading. Single-lane traffic imposed. Repair estimate: 45 days.
action_required: Coordinate with NHAI for emergency repair, arrange alternate route signage

title: Bandh Call - Patna on June 12
description: Opposition parties called Bihar Bandh on June 12 over electricity tariff hike. Intelligence inputs suggest moderate response expected in Patna, Gaya, Bhagalpur.
action_required: Standard bandh protocol, ensure essential services unaffected
